items.headline: Yankees' Cam Schlittler, amid threats, excited to face Red Sox
items.description: Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler said he and his family have received threats ahead of his start vs. the Red Sox, but he's "excited" to be making his Fenway Park debut.

items.headline: Will Sutherland ruled out of Yorkshire stint with shoulder injury
items.description: Australian allrounder was due to play two County Championship matches and the T20 Blast

items.headline: Machida Zelvia continue to aim for AFC Champions League Elite triumph on debut
items.description: Ahead of their semifinal against Shabab Al Ahli, Machida Zelvia continue to dream of winning the AFC Champions League Elite on debut.

items.headline: GK Jonathan Klinsmann breaks neck playing for Cesena
items.description: Goalkeeper Jonathan Klinsmann, the son of former Germany striker Jürgen Klinsmann, is recovering from a broken neck sustained playing for second-tier Italian side Cesena on Saturday.

items.headline: Moni, Sharmin help Bangladesh register maiden ODI win against Sri Lanka
items.description: Bangladesh lost four wickets for one run when they were close to the finish line, but averted disaster in the end

items.description: All of the odds, recommended prop bets and trends in baseball for Monday, April 20.

items.headline: Sources: Bulls get OK to interview for front office vacancies
items.description: The Bulls have started the search for their new head of basketball operations, receiving permission to interview multiple NBA executives, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Marcel Hug wins Boston Marathon wheelchair title for 9th time
items.description: Marcel Hug of Switzerland won his ninth Boston Marathon men's wheelchair title Monday, riding a tailwind to finish in an unofficial time of 1 hour, 16 minutes, 6 seconds. He missed breaking his own course record by 33 seconds.

items.headline: Who has played the most NBA playoff games without a title?
items.description: Chris Paul, Patrick Ewing and John Stockton are among NBA greats who have played the most playoff games without winning a championship.

items.headline: Dream's Brionna Jones has knee surgery, uncertain for start of season
items.description: Dream center Brionna Jones has had right knee surgery, leaving her status uncertain for the start of the WNBA season.

items.headline: Sixes vs stability: SRH and DC brace for another run-fest in Hyderabad
items.description: Both teams are neck-and-neck on the points table, but their top-order approaches couldn't be more different this season
